TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Malangohahay to 'edo == kacitawidwidan ano mipawsa han no wawa ko wina ho ira ko cecay a fafahiyan malingad i omaoh nira, ca ka citafo nani loma' nira, "pawsa han to kako ina" han nira ko sowal ci inaan nira, " hayi " sa ko wina nira, "ano mipawsa kiso haw kacitawidwidan to" han to no wawa nira koya wina, o wina sato nira " hayi " sato. Kalahokan to ko cidal, " kering kering kering " sato ko soni noya tawidwidan ni ina, iya sato a ngohah noya wawa o 'edo, o cafay noya wawa a maomah, alalasolasot sato i lalinik no 'atol, tahira to ko wina noy wawa nira, kakahad ko nifariwan nina wawa nira, " cima ko tihi iso a mifariw " han to nira ko sowal toya wawa nira, " cecayay kako " han nira a misamangah ko sowal to wina nira, olah sato to nikakahad a nifariwaw no wawa nira, hinam han ira ko ngohah no wawa nira to 'edo a mipadang mifariw. Hokhok han no wina ma'araw ko 'alomanay 'edo mifaeiw Iya sato wina nira, ca ho kafana' to nikacingohah no wawa nira to 'edo, harateng sato ko wina nira, cima ko tihi no wawa ako,no matira to ko nikakahad ko nifariwan a pala,caay to kapatolas a misaharaterateng kiya wina. Roma sato a romi'ad, mipawsa haca to sakalahok no wawa nira, nikawrira, tona romi'ad caay to ka citawidwidan kiya wina nira, hokhok han to nira wina a mingata, oya sato a ngohah niya wawa nira to 'edo 'aloman, maan ko pinag a misa'osi to ka'aloman, sacaciyaw saan a mifariw, " ci,ci,ci,ci,ci " saan ko caciyaw nangra a mifariw. Matengteng no wina ko wikol no 'edo a moroc " o matiniay sa ca kamo" han to no ina nira koya wawa nira ato ya 'edo", iya sato a 'edo alalasolasot sato i lalinik no 'atol, iya sa wina " o ninian ko ngahah no wawa ako" sato kiya wina noya wawa, opod han nira a mitengteng koya wikol no 'edo, moroc saan. O nini ko saka awa ko fanoh no wikol no 'edo, o matengtengay a mamoroc no ina noya fafahiyan wawa. === Pacefaday Tilid ===
S.PHON: == ma…ĺaŇčo~uńßańßaj to~u °…ô…¨~…ģo~u == ka ¶itawi…¨~…ģwi…¨~…ģan ano~u mipawsa ńßan no~u wawa ko~u wina ńßo~u ira ko~u ¶…ô ¶aj a fafańßijan ma…ĺiŇča…¨~…ģ i o~umao~uńß nira, ¶a ka ¶itafo~u nani …ĺo~uma ° nira, "pawsa ńßan to~u kako~u ina" ńßan nira ko~u so~uwa…ĺ ¶i inaan nira, " ńßaji " sa ko~u wina nira, "ano~u mipawsa kiso~u ńßaw ka ¶itawi…¨~…ģwi…¨~…ģan to~u" ńßan to~u no~u wawa nira ko~uja wina, o~u wina sato~u nira " ńßaji " sato~u. ka…ĺańßo~ukan to~u ko~u ¶i…¨~…ģa…ĺ, " k…ôriŇč k…ôriŇč k…ôriŇč " sato~u ko~u so~uni no~uja tawi…¨~…ģwi…¨~…ģan ni ina, ija sato~u a Ňčo~uńßańß no~uja wawa o~u °…ô…¨~…ģo~u, o~u ¶afaj no~uja wawa a mao~umańß, a…ĺa…ĺaso~u…ĺaso~ut sato~u i …ĺa…ĺinik no~u °ato~u…ĺ, tańßira to~u ko~u wina no~uj wawa nira, kakańßa…¨~…ģ ko~u nifariwan nina wawa nira, " ¶ima ko~u tińßi iso~u a mifariw " ńßan to~u nira ko~u so~uwa…ĺ to~uja wawa nira, " ¶…ô ¶ajaj kako~u " ńßan nira a misamaŇčańß ko~u so~uwa…ĺ to~u wina nira, o~u…ĺańß sato~u to~u nikakańßa…¨~…ģ a nifariwaw no~u wawa nira, ńßinam ńßan ira ko~u Ňčo~uńßańß no~u wawa nira to~u °…ô…¨~…ģo~u a mipa…¨~…ģaŇč mifariw. ńßo~ukńßo~uk ńßan no~u wina ma °araw ko~u °a…ĺo~umanaj °…ô…¨~…ģo~u mifa…ôiw ija sato~u wina nira, ¶a ńßo~u kafana ° to~u nika ¶iŇčo~uńßańß no~u wawa nira to~u °…ô…¨~…ģo~u, ńßarat…ôŇč sato~u ko~u wina nira, ¶ima ko~u tińßi no~u wawa ako~u,no~u matira to~u ko~u nikakańßa…¨~…ģ ko~u nifariwan a pa…ĺa, ¶aaj to~u kapato~u…ĺas a misańßarat…ôrat…ôŇč kija wina. ro~uma sato~u a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, mipawsa ńßa ¶a to~u saka…ĺańßo~uk no~u wawa nira, nikawrira, to~una ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ ¶aaj to~u ka ¶itawi…¨~…ģwi…¨~…ģan kija wina nira, ńßo~ukńßo~uk ńßan to~u nira wina a miŇčata, o~uja sato~u a Ňčo~uńßańß nija wawa nira to~u °…ô…¨~…ģo~u °a…ĺo~uman, maan ko~u pina* a misa °o~usi to~u ka °a…ĺo~uman, sa ¶a ¶ijaw saan a mifariw, " ¶i, ¶i, ¶i, ¶i, ¶i " saan ko~u ¶a ¶ijaw naŇčra a mifariw. mat…ôŇčt…ôŇč no~u wina ko~u wiko~u…ĺ no~u °…ô…¨~…ģo~u a mo~uro~u ¶ " o~u matiniaj sa ¶a kamo~u" ńßan to~u no~u ina nira ko~uja wawa nira ato~u ja °…ô…¨~…ģo~u", ija sato~u a °…ô…¨~…ģo~u a…ĺa…ĺaso~u…ĺaso~ut sato~u i …ĺa…ĺinik no~u °ato~u…ĺ, ija sa wina " o~u ninian ko~u Ňčańßańß no~u wawa ako~u" sato~u kija wina no~uja wawa, o~upo~u…¨~…ģ ńßan nira a mit…ôŇčt…ôŇč ko~uja wiko~u…ĺ no~u °…ô…¨~…ģo~u, mo~uro~u ¶ saan. o~u nini ko~u saka awa ko~u fano~uńß no~u wiko~u…ĺ no~u °…ô…¨~…ģo~u, o~u mat…ôŇčt…ôŇčaj a mamo~uro~u ¶ no~u ina no~uja fafańßijan wawa. === pa ¶…ôfa…¨~…ģaj ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ ===
S.FORM: == Malangohahay to 'edo == kacitawidwidan ano mipawsa han no wawa ko wina ho ira ko cecay a fafahiyan malingad i omaoh nira, ca ka citafo nani loma' nira, "pawsa han to kako ina" han nira ko sowal ci inaan nira, " hayi " sa ko wina nira, "ano mipawsa kiso haw kacitawidwidan to" han to no wawa nira koya wina, o wina sato nira " hayi " sato. Kalahokan to ko cidal, " kering kering kering " sato ko soni noya tawidwidan ni ina, iya sato a ngohah noya wawa o 'edo, o cafay noya wawa a maomah, alalasolasot sato i lalinik no 'atol, tahira to ko wina noy wawa nira, kakahad ko nifariwan nina wawa nira, " cima ko tihi iso a mifariw " han to nira ko sowal toya wawa nira, " cecayay kako " han nira a misamangah ko sowal to wina nira, olah sato to nikakahad a nifariwaw no wawa nira, hinam han ira ko ngohah no wawa nira to 'edo a mipadang mifariw. Hokhok han no wina ma'araw ko 'alomanay 'edo mifaeiw Iya sato wina nira, ca ho kafana' to nikacingohah no wawa nira to 'edo, harateng sato ko wina nira, cima ko tihi no wawa ako,no matira to ko nikakahad ko nifariwan a pala,caay to kapatolas a misaharaterateng kiya wina. Roma sato a romi'ad, mipawsa haca to sakalahok no wawa nira, nikawrira, tona romi'ad caay to ka citawidwidan kiya wina nira, hokhok han to nira wina a mingata, oya sato a ngohah niya wawa nira to 'edo 'aloman, maan ko pinag a misa'osi to ka'aloman, sacaciyaw saan a mifariw, " ci,ci,ci,ci,ci " saan ko caciyaw nangra a mifariw. Matengteng no wina ko wikol no 'edo a moroc " o matiniay sa ca kamo" han to no ina nira koya wawa nira ato ya 'edo", iya sato a 'edo alalasolasot sato i lalinik no 'atol, iya sa wina " o ninian ko ngahah no wawa ako" sato kiya wina noya wawa, opod han nira a mitengteng koya wikol no 'edo, moroc saan. O nini ko saka awa ko fanoh no wikol no 'edo, o matengtengay a mamoroc no ina noya fafahiyan wawa. === Pacefaday Tilid ===
S.PHON: == ma…ĺaŇčo~uńßańßaj to~u °…ô…¨~…ģo~u == ka ¶itawi…¨~…ģwi…¨~…ģan ano~u mipawsa ńßan no~u wawa ko~u wina ńßo~u ira ko~u ¶…ô ¶aj a fafańßijan ma…ĺiŇča…¨~…ģ i o~umao~uńß nira, ¶a ka ¶itafo~u nani …ĺo~uma ° nira, "pawsa ńßan to~u kako~u ina" ńßan nira ko~u so~uwa…ĺ ¶i inaan nira, " ńßaji " sa ko~u wina nira, "ano~u mipawsa kiso~u ńßaw ka ¶itawi…¨~…ģwi…¨~…ģan to~u" ńßan to~u no~u wawa nira ko~uja wina, o~u wina sato~u nira " ńßaji " sato~u. ka…ĺańßo~ukan to~u ko~u ¶i…¨~…ģa…ĺ, " k…ôriŇč k…ôriŇč k…ôriŇč " sato~u ko~u so~uni no~uja tawi…¨~…ģwi…¨~…ģan ni ina, ija sato~u a Ňčo~uńßańß no~uja wawa o~u °…ô…¨~…ģo~u, o~u ¶afaj no~uja wawa a mao~umańß, a…ĺa…ĺaso~u…ĺaso~ut sato~u i …ĺa…ĺinik no~u °ato~u…ĺ, tańßira to~u ko~u wina no~uj wawa nira, kakańßa…¨~…ģ ko~u nifariwan nina wawa nira, " ¶ima ko~u tińßi iso~u a mifariw " ńßan to~u nira ko~u so~uwa…ĺ to~uja wawa nira, " ¶…ô ¶ajaj kako~u " ńßan nira a misamaŇčańß ko~u so~uwa…ĺ to~u wina nira, o~u…ĺańß sato~u to~u nikakańßa…¨~…ģ a nifariwaw no~u wawa nira, ńßinam ńßan ira ko~u Ňčo~uńßańß no~u wawa nira to~u °…ô…¨~…ģo~u a mipa…¨~…ģaŇč mifariw. ńßo~ukńßo~uk ńßan no~u wina ma °araw ko~u °a…ĺo~umanaj °…ô…¨~…ģo~u mifa…ôiw ija sato~u wina nira, ¶a ńßo~u kafana ° to~u nika ¶iŇčo~uńßańß no~u wawa nira to~u °…ô…¨~…ģo~u, ńßarat…ôŇč sato~u ko~u wina nira, ¶ima ko~u tińßi no~u wawa ako~u,no~u matira to~u ko~u nikakańßa…¨~…ģ ko~u nifariwan a pa…ĺa, ¶aaj to~u kapato~u…ĺas a misańßarat…ôrat…ôŇč kija wina. ro~uma sato~u a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, mipawsa ńßa ¶a to~u saka…ĺańßo~uk no~u wawa nira, nikawrira, to~una ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ ¶aaj to~u ka ¶itawi…¨~…ģwi…¨~…ģan kija wina nira, ńßo~ukńßo~uk ńßan to~u nira wina a miŇčata, o~uja sato~u a Ňčo~uńßańß nija wawa nira to~u °…ô…¨~…ģo~u °a…ĺo~uman, maan ko~u pina* a misa °o~usi to~u ka °a…ĺo~uman, sa ¶a ¶ijaw saan a mifariw, " ¶i, ¶i, ¶i, ¶i, ¶i " saan ko~u ¶a ¶ijaw naŇčra a mifariw. mat…ôŇčt…ôŇč no~u wina ko~u wiko~u…ĺ no~u °…ô…¨~…ģo~u a mo~uro~u ¶ " o~u matiniaj sa ¶a kamo~u" ńßan to~u no~u ina nira ko~uja wawa nira ato~u ja °…ô…¨~…ģo~u", ija sato~u a °…ô…¨~…ģo~u a…ĺa…ĺaso~u…ĺaso~ut sato~u i …ĺa…ĺinik no~u °ato~u…ĺ, ija sa wina " o~u ninian ko~u Ňčańßańß no~u wawa ako~u" sato~u kija wina no~uja wawa, o~upo~u…¨~…ģ ńßan nira a mit…ôŇčt…ôŇč ko~uja wiko~u…ĺ no~u °…ô…¨~…ģo~u, mo~uro~u ¶ saan. o~u nini ko~u saka awa ko~u fano~uńß no~u wiko~u…ĺ no~u °…ô…¨~…ģo~u, o~u mat…ôŇčt…ôŇčaj a mamo~uro~u ¶ no~u ina no~uja fafańßijan wawa. === pa ¶…ôfa…¨~…ģaj ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ ===
